prompt: Build a services dashboard that shows three service cards in a responsive grid: broadband, mobile, and energy. On mobile they should stack, on tablet show two columns, on desktop show three. Each card has a title and a brief status line.

assertions.text: Mobile breakpoint included in responsive gridColumnSpan or columns prop
Gap uses token string values (e.g. '300') not numeric values (e.g. 3)
Gap/spacing set on parent container, not margin on individual cards
